---
title: "talk with mentor"
author: "Anjani Nandan"
date: "2026-05-12"
categories: [update,quarto,pkgdown]
image: "image.jpg"
---

I learned how to use quarto+netlify.

![](image.jpg)

I follow all the steps what mentor taught us about quarto. 
Also i am exploring the codebase of mlr3oml. And learned about the pkgdown.So i will also use this into my package mlr3hf.
